---
title: "Page Not Found"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/games/common.css">
          <script src="/assets/games/common.js" defer></script>
          <script src="/assets/games/registry.js" defer></script>
---

```{=html}
<section class="mlsp-404-hero" aria-labelledby="mlsp-404-title">
  <p class="mlsp-404-eyebrow">ROUTE NOT FOUND</p>
  <h1 id="mlsp-404-title">That request fell off the graph.</h1>
  <p class="mlsp-404-lede">The page moved, the link broke, or the path never existed. Recover fast, or run a 30-second systems demo while you reorient.</p>
  <div class="mlsp-404-actions">
    <a class="mlsp-404-primary" href="/">Go Home</a>
    <a class="mlsp-404-secondary" href="/vol1/">Volume I</a>
    <a class="mlsp-404-secondary" href="/vol2/">Volume II</a>
    <a class="mlsp-404-secondary" href="/games/">Open Playground</a>
    <a class="mlsp-404-secondary" href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/issues/new">Report Broken Link</a>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="mlsp-404-lab">
  <div class="mlsp-404-lab-head">
    <div>
      <p class="mlsp-404-kicker">FEATURED SYSTEMS DEMO</p>
      <h2 id="mlsp-feature-title">loading…</h2>
      <p id="mlsp-feature-copy" class="mlsp-404-copy">Booting the playground...</p>
    </div>
    <div class="mlsp-404-switcher-wrap">
      <span class="mlsp-404-switcher-label">Try another concept</span>
      <div id="mlsp-switcher" class="mlsp-404-switcher" role="tablist" aria-label="Choose a concept demo"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="mlsp-game-container" role="region" aria-label="Featured MLSysBook Playground mini-game">
    <canvas id="mlsp-canvas" class="mlsp-game-canvas" width="680" height="460"></canvas>
    <div class="mlsp-game-hud">
      <span class="mlsp-score" id="mlsp-hud">loading demo…</span>
      <span id="mlsp-hint">Choose a concept or just start playing.</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="mlsp-404-footnote">The default demo is tuned for a 404: fast to understand, starts on first click, and teaches one systems idea. Deeper/weirder concepts still live in the full <a href="/games/">Playground</a>.</p>
</div>

<div id="mlsp-aha-slot"></div>

<div class="mlsp-404-destinations">
  <a class="mlsp-404-destination" href="/tinytorch/"><strong>TinyTorch</strong><span>Build your own ML framework</span></a>
  <a class="mlsp-404-destination" href="/labs/"><strong>Labs</strong><span>Hands-on systems exercises</span></a>
  <a class="mlsp-404-destination" href="/slides/"><strong>Slides</strong><span>Course and lecture material</span></a>
  <a class="mlsp-404-destination" href="/instructors/"><strong>Instructor Hub</strong><span>Teaching resources and course kits</span></a>
</div>

<script>
(function mount404Game(){
  var currentApi = null;
  var currentToken = 0;

  function boot() {
    if (!window.MLSP || !MLSP.registry) return setTimeout(boot, 30);
    MLSP.games = MLSP.games || {};

    var featured = getFeatured404Games();
    if (!featured.length) {
      document.getElementById("mlsp-hud").textContent = "no demos available";
      return;
    }

    buildSwitcher(featured);
    mountGame(featured[0]);
  }

  function getFeatured404Games() {
    var inline = (MLSP.registry || []).filter(function(g) {
      return g.inline404 === true && (g.module || g.script);
    });
    inline.sort(function(a, b) {
      return (b.featured404 === true) - (a.featured404 === true);
    });
    return inline;
  }

  function buildSwitcher(games) {
    var switcher = document.getElementById("mlsp-switcher");
    switcher.innerHTML = "";
    games.forEach(function(game) {
      var btn = document.createElement("button");
      btn.type = "button";
      btn.className = "mlsp-404-chip";
      btn.textContent = game.name;
      btn.setAttribute("role", "tab");
      btn.dataset.gameId = game.id;
      btn.addEventListener("click", function() { mountGame(game); });
      switcher.appendChild(btn);
    });
  }

  function mountGame(game) {
    var token = ++currentToken;
    var $hud  = document.getElementById("mlsp-hud");
    var $hint = document.getElementById("mlsp-hint");
    var $title = document.getElementById("mlsp-feature-title");
    var $copy = document.getElementById("mlsp-feature-copy");
    var ahaSlot = document.getElementById("mlsp-aha-slot");

    if (currentApi && currentApi.destroy) {
      try { currentApi.destroy(); } catch (e) {}
      currentApi = null;
    }
    ahaSlot.innerHTML = "";
    var canvas = resetCanvas();

    setActiveChip(game.id);
    $title.textContent = game.name;
    $copy.textContent = describeGame(game);
    $hud.textContent = "loading " + game.name.toLowerCase() + "…";
    $hint.innerHTML = hintForGame(game);

    loadGame(game).then(function() {
      if (token !== currentToken) return;
      if (!MLSP.games || !MLSP.games[game.id]) {
        $hud.textContent = "game failed to load";
        return;
      }
      var pendingResult = null;
      var resolvedApi = null;
      Promise.resolve(MLSP.games[game.id](canvas, createGameOptions(game, {
        onScoreChange: function(s) {
          $hud.textContent = formatHud(game, s);
        },
        onGameOver: function(result) {
          if (resolvedApi) attachAha(resolvedApi, result);
          else pendingResult = result;
        },
        onRetry: function() { mountGame(game); }
      }))).then(function(api) {
        if (token !== currentToken) {
          if (api && api.destroy) {
            try { api.destroy(); } catch (e) {}
          }
          return;
        }
        currentApi = api;
        resolvedApi = api;
        if (pendingResult) attachAha(api, pendingResult);
      });

      function attachAha(api, result) {
        MLSP.showAhaCard(ahaSlot, api.ahaLabel, api.ahaText, api.ahaLink);
        var card = ahaSlot.querySelector(".mlsp-aha-card");
        if (card && api.buildShareText && result) {
          var share = document.createElement("button");
          share.type = "button";
          share.textContent = "📋 Copy share text";
          share.style.cssText = "margin-top:0.75rem;background:#a31f34;color:#fff;border:none;padding:0.4rem 0.85rem;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:600;";
          share.addEventListener("click", function() {
            var txt = api.buildShareText(result);
            if (navigator.clipboard) {
              navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt).then(function(){
                share.textContent = "✓ Copied!";
                setTimeout(function(){ share.textContent = "📋 Copy share text"; }, 1800);
              });
            }
          });
          card.appendChild(share);
        }
      }
    }).catch(function() {
      if (token === currentToken) $hud.textContent = "game script failed to load";
    });
  }

  function resetCanvas() {
    var oldCanvas = document.getElementById("mlsp-canvas");
    if (oldCanvas) {
      var fresh = oldCanvas.cloneNode(false);
      oldCanvas.parentNode.replaceChild(fresh, oldCanvas);
      return fresh;
    }
    var container = document.querySelector(".mlsp-game-container");
    var newCanvas = document.createElement("canvas");
    newCanvas.id = "mlsp-canvas";
    newCanvas.className = "mlsp-game-canvas";
    newCanvas.width = 680;
    newCanvas.height = 460;
    container.insertBefore(newCanvas, container.firstChild);
    return newCanvas;
  }

  function createGameOptions(game, baseOpts) {
    var opts = {};
    for (var k in baseOpts) opts[k] = baseOpts[k];
    if (game.id === "prune") {
      opts.startOnFirstAction = true;
      opts.safeFirstHint = true;
      opts.relaxedHitTest = true;
    }
    return opts;
  }

  function setActiveChip(gameId) {
    var chips = document.querySelectorAll(".mlsp-404-chip");
    for (var i = 0; i < chips.length; i++) {
      var active = chips[i].dataset.gameId === gameId;
      chips[i].classList.toggle("is-active", active);
      chips[i].setAttribute("aria-selected", active ? "true" : "false");
    }
  }

  function loadGame(game) {
    if (game.module) {
      return import("/assets/games/runtime.mjs").then(function() {
        return import(game.module);
      });
    }
    return new Promise(function(resolve, reject) {
      var s = document.createElement("script");
      s.src = game.script;
      s.onload = resolve;
      s.onerror = reject;
      document.head.appendChild(s);
    });
  }

  function describeGame(game) {
    if (game.id === "prune") return "A calm, click-first pruning demo. Cut the faint weights, protect the bright ones, and see how magnitude pruning trades sparsity against accuracy.";
    if (game.id === "quantization") return "A more demanding demo: lower precision saves bits, but the target starts lying to you. Great for replay, slightly more setup.";
    if (game.id === "oom") return "A systems-heavy memory toy. Useful, but we keep it as an optional concept because it asks more from you than the flagship does.";
    return game.teaches;
  }

  function hintForGame(game) {
    if (game.id === "prune") return "Default flagship demo · click a faint weight to begin · <kbd>R</kbd> retry";
    if (game.id === "quantization") return "Cycle precision, then fire · <kbd>1-6</kbd> layer dials · <kbd>SPACE</kbd> shoot · <kbd>R</kbd> retry";
    if (game.id === "oom") return "Move and hard-drop blocks · <kbd>← →</kbd> move · <kbd>SPACE</kbd> drop · <kbd>R</kbd> retry";
    return "playing <strong>" + game.name + "</strong> · <kbd>R</kbd> retry";
  }

  function formatHud(game, s) {
    if (!s) return game.name + " · " + game.teaches;
    if (game.id === "prune" && typeof s.accuracy === "number" && typeof s.sparsity === "number") {
      if (s.started === false) return "click a faint weight to start · protect bright weights";
      return s.accuracy.toFixed(1) + "% acc · " + s.sparsity.toFixed(0) + "% sparse";
    }
    if (typeof s.stepsCompleted === "number" && typeof s.idlePct === "number") {
      return "step " + s.stepsCompleted + " · idle " + s.idlePct.toFixed(0) + "%";
    }
    if (typeof s.bitsUsed === "number" && typeof s.accuracy === "number") {
      return s.bitsUsed + " / " + s.budget + " bits · " + s.accuracy + "% acc";
    }
    if (typeof s.score === "number") {
      return "score " + s.score;
    }
    return game.name + " · " + game.teaches;
  }

  boot();
})();
</script>
```

## 🧭 Still lost?

- [🏠 mlsysbook.ai](/) — the unified landing page
- [📖 Volume I: Foundations](/vol1/) · [📖 Volume II: At Scale](/vol2/)
- [🔥 TinyTorch](/tinytorch/) · [🔮 Labs](/labs/) · [📦 Hardware Kits](/kits/) · [🧮 MLSys·im](/mlsysim/)
- [🎞️ Slides](/slides/) · [🎓 Instructor Hub](/instructors/) · [🎯 StaffML](/staffml/)
- [📝 Report a broken link](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/issues/new) · [💬 Ask the community](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions)

---

*"Every system has a 404 page. Welcome to ours."* 🪐
